title: raphisanthe lateritia
intro: Raphisanthe lateritia, also known as the wild jasmine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Oleaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Raphisanthe lateritia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and preventing the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
